# WebWithIrfan

> I'm Irfan Awan, a WordPress and frontend developer. I build fast, custom websites, WooCommerce and multivendor stores, and web apps in React, Vite, and Next.js. I work remotely with clients worldwide. Email: info@webwithirfan.com

This is a single-page site. The sections below are anchors on the home page (https://webwithirfan.com/).

## Services
- [WordPress Development](https://webwithirfan.com/#services): Custom themes, Elementor sites, and plugins. Fast, secure, and easy to edit yourself.
- [eCommerce & Multivendor](https://webwithirfan.com/#services): WooCommerce shops and multivendor marketplaces with payment gateways, product catalogs, and vendor dashboards.
- [Frontend Development](https://webwithirfan.com/#services): Clean, responsive pages in modern HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
- [Web App Development](https://webwithirfan.com/#services): React with Vite, or Next.js with TypeScript, connected to a real backend like Supabase.
- [AI Workflow Automation](https://webwithirfan.com/#services): Connect your tools and automate repeat tasks to save time.

## Work
- [Selected projects](https://webwithirfan.com/#projects): A team management platform (React, Vite, Supabase), a 20+ tool DevTools Chrome extension, local business WordPress sites, and WooCommerce and multivendor stores.
- [Free dev tools](https://webwithirfan.com/#tools): Clamp calculator, box shadow and gradient builders, CSS inspector, broken link checker, palette extractor, CSS minifier, and meta tag previewer.

## About
- [How I work](https://webwithirfan.com/#process): Five steps. Discovery, Plan, Build, Optimize, and Handover, with previews to review at every stage.
- [About Irfan](https://webwithirfan.com/#about): 6+ years building for the web. 140+ projects, about 95 average Lighthouse score, and 30+ stores and sites.
- [FAQ](https://webwithirfan.com/#faq): Pricing, timelines, redesigns and migrations, editing your own site, support after launch, and content.

## Contact
- [Get in touch](https://webwithirfan.com/#contact): Pick a project type and budget in the form. Email info@webwithirfan.com.
- GitHub: https://github.com/irfanawanwebdev
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/muhammad-irfan-webdev/
